/cwe/weakness/554.Name: ASP.NET Misconfiguration: Not Using Input Validation Framework
/cwe/weakness/554.Description: The ASP.NET application does not use an input validation framework.

CommonConsequences.Note: Unchecked input leads to cross-site scripting, process control, and SQL injection vulnerabilities, among others.

PotentialMitigations.Description:
Use the ASP.NET validation framework to check all program input before it is processed by the application. Example uses of the validation framework include checking to ensure that:


  - Phone number fields contain only valid characters in phone numbers

  - Boolean values are only "T" or "F"

  - Free-form strings are of a reasonable length and composition
